content: Hi all! I've gotten involved more recently and I'd like to port my out of tree Rust kernel module over to the existing Rust effort as my introductory project. Has there been any work around bindings for char devices yet?
Yes, we have basic support for character devices: https://rust-for-linux.github.io/docs/kernel/chrdev/struct.Registration.html
Looks like the docs haven't been updated in 5 months: https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/docs

Yeah, that repo gets updated when I send it upstream, not "live" (we will have one submission soon). I will be changing the setup/workflow when we get into upstream; ideally we should have them in kernel.org for full releases at least and somewhere else for any change on rust-next.
Oh wonderful! I'll give that a shot.
